/* ── CHAT ── */ #chat-container { position: fixed; bottom: 16px; left: 16px; width: 340px; z-index: 120; display: none; flex-direction: column; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.82); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18); border-radius: 4px; overflow: hidden; pointer-events: auto; font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; } #chat-container.chat-visible { display: flex; } #chat-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 4px 8px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.07); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); cursor: default; user-select: none; } #chat-header-label { color: #fff; font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 10px; font-weight: bold; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; } #chat-minimize { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); font-size: 15px; line-height: 1; cursor: pointer; padding: 0 2px; transition: color 0.15s; } #chat-minimize:hover { color: #fff; } #chat-body { display: flex; flex-direction: column; } #chat-log { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0px; max-height: 160px; overflow-y: auto; overflow-x: hidden; padding: 4px 6px; scrollbar-width: thin; scrollbar-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.15) transparent; } .chat-msg { color: #ccc; font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 11px; line-height: 1.45; word-break: break-word; padding: 1px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04); opacity: 1; transition: opacity 0.8s; } .chat-msg:last-child { border-bottom: none; } .chat-msg.fading { opacity: 0; } .chat-msg .chat-name { font-weight: bold; color: #fff; } #chat-input-row { border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); padding: 4px 6px; display: none; align-items: center; gap: 4px; } #chat-input-row.active { display: flex; } #chat-input { flex: 1; background: transparent; border: none; color: #fff; font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 11px; outline: none; } #chat-input::placeholder { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.3); } #chat-send { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.12); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); color: #fff; font-family: "Courier New", monospace; font-size: 11px; padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 3px; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; flex-shrink: 0; } #chat-send:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.22); } #chat-send { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.12); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); color: #fff; font-family: "Courier New", monospace; font-size: 11px; padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 3px; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; flex-shrink: 0; } #chat-send:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.22); } #chat-container.minimized #chat-body { display: none; } /* ── END CHAT ── */

F Pick up loot  |  Shift Crouch (hold)

💡 When the volcano erupts, get to high ground.
💡 Sprint ability for first 15 seconds of match.
